title: Double Agents
writer: Frédéric Dard, Robert Hossein, Louis Martin
actors: Robert Hossein, Marina Vlady, Michel Etcheverry
plot: (1959) Robert Hossein, Marina Vlady, Robert Le Beal. A brilliant "little" spy film. Hossein and Vlady play mysterious characters who meet up one night in a lonely cabin in the wilds of Normandy. They are both spies, but whom do th...
